bridge_equation_v40.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v40 = mix(B_plastic_v39, L_sys_field_cons, 1 - P_sys_field_cons, D_feature_v34, 1 - G_brain_v34)
bridge_equation_v40.structure_term: B_struct_v40 = mix(B_struct_v39, S_sys_field_cons, R_sys_field_cons, 1 - P_sys_field_cons, D_structure_v34)
bridge_equation_v40.readiness_term: R_train_v40 = mix(R_train_v39, B_plastic_v40, B_struct_v40, R_sys_field_cons, D_align_v34, 1 - P_sys_field_cons)

project_readout.summary: training bridge v40 checks whether systemic low-risk field consolidation begins to reduce rule-layer risk in a more consolidated and field-like way.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether this consolidated low-risk field still survives after it is folded into the next closed-form core.
